headline: International Flavors (IFF) Down 14.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: International Flavors (IFF) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Is International Flavors & Fragrances Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While International Flavors & Fragrances has lagged behind the S&P 500 over the past year, analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
